Administrative records place it in '''late March to early April''', as part of the '''first month of the {{ill|Peret|de|Peret (Altes Ägypten)|1=Season of the Emergence|lt=Peret|2=de|3=Peret (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=ペレト|6=zh|7=播種季|8=ru|9=Перет|10=uk|11=Перет|13=Season of the Emergence|14=es|15=Estación de la emergencia|16=fr|17=Peret|18=pl|19=Peret|20=ro|21=Peret|12=draft|12=draft}} season'''. == See Also == * {{ill|Gezer calendar|de|Gezer-Kalender|12=draft|12=draft}} == References == * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss|12=draft|12=draft}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten: Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens.'' Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, {{Falsche ISBN|3-8067-8086-X}} * {{ill|Richard Anthony Parker|de|Richard Anthony Parker|12=draft|12=draft}}: ''The calendars of ancient Egypt.'' Chicago Press, Chicago 1950. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott|12=draft|12=draft}}: ''Altägyptische Festdaten.'' Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz / Wiesbaden 1950. {{Navigationsleiste Ägyptische Kalendermonate bis zum Anfang des Neuen Reiches}} {{Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months}} {{translated page|de|Chenti-chet|version=245035418|comment=Imported full de history}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Khenti-khet}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Month of the ancient Egyptian calendar]] [[Category:Agricultural history (field agriculture)]] [[Category:Harvest]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:Chenti-chet]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects in ]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace ]] }} [[sn:Khenti-khet]] [[de:Chenti-chet]] [[sn:Chenti-chet]] [[sn:henti-chet]]

{{Infobox Hieroglyphen |NAME = W18-F32:X1 N5 |NAME-TRANSKRIPTION = |NAME-ERKLÄRUNG = {{ill|Khenti-khet|de|Chentechtai|qq=draft|qq=draft}}
''Ḫntj-ẖt''
''The One of the Valley'' |NAME2 = N11:Z1*Z1*Z1 S-N35B
3-nu-schemu |NAME2-TRANSKRIPTION = ''3-nw-šmw'' |NAME2-ERKLÄRUNG = ''Third month of the {{ill|Shemu|de|Schemu|1=Season of the Harvest|lt=Schemu|qq=draft|qq=draft}} period'' |NAME3 = F13:X1-G17-G1-O34:Aa1-D58-D46:X1-M34
Wepet-em-asech-bedet |NAME3-TRANSKRIPTION = ''Wpt-m-3sḫ-bdt'' |NAME3-ERKLÄRUNG = ''Beginning of the harvest of {{ill|Emmer wheat|de|Emmer (Getreide)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}'' |BILD1 = Usdaemmer1.jpg |BILD1-BREITE = 210px }} '''Khenti-khet''' was the term used in the {{ill|Ancient Egyptian calendar|de|Ägyptischer Kalender|qq=draft|qq=draft}} for the harvest season and the third month of the {{ill|Shemu|de|Schemu|1=Season of the Harvest|lt=Schemu|qq=draft|qq=draft}} period. The name '''"The One of the Valley"''' refers to its '''coincidence with the {{ill|Beautiful Festival of the Valley|de|Schönes Fest vom Wüstental|qq=draft|qq=draft}}'''. From the '''{{ill|Predynastic Egypt|de|Prädynastik (Ägypten)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}''' until the end of the '''{{ill|Middle Kingdom of Egypt|de|Mittleres Reich (Ägypten)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}''', Khenti-khet originally represented the '''eleventh month''' of the '''{{ill|Sothic calendar|1=Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|1=Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar#Der ursprüngliche Mondkalender|qq=draft|qq=draft}}''', covering the period from '''April 1 to April 30'''. == Background == === Position in the Calendar === {{ill|Alan Gardiner|de|Alan Gardiner|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Richard Anthony Parker|de|Richard Anthony Parker|qq=draft|qq=draft}} suggest that '''Khenti-khet underwent shifts in the calendar system''' over time, which led to its '''placement as the tenth month from the {{ill|New Kingdom of Egypt|de|Neues Reich|qq=draft|qq=draft}} onwards'''. In the '''{{ill|Ebers calendar|de|Ebers-Kalender|qq=draft|qq=draft}}''' (ca. '''1517 BCE'''), '''Khenti-khet''' corresponded to the '''first Shemu month''', falling between: * '''April 15 – May 14''' ({{ill|Elephantine|de|Elephantine|qq=draft|qq=draft}}) * '''April 21 – May 20''' ({{ill|Memphis, Egypt|de|Memphis (Ägypten)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}) The name of the '''third Shemu month''' was later changed to '''{{ill|Epiphi|de|Epiphi|qq=draft|qq=draft}}'''. === Beginning of the Wheat Harvest === The '''New Kingdom lunar calendar month {{ill|Paoni|de|Payni|qq=draft|qq=draft}}''' is recorded in texts from the '''{{ill|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|de|12. Dynastie|qq=draft|qq=draft}}''' under the name '''Khenti-khet''', marking the '''beginning of the wheat harvest'''. Administrative records place it in '''late March to early April''', as part of the '''first month of the {{ill|Peret|de|Peret (Altes Ägypten)|1=Season of the Emergence|lt=Peret|2=de|3=Peret (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=ペレト|6=zh|7=播種季|8=ru|9=Перет|10=uk|11=Перет|13=Season of the Emergence|14=es|15=Estación de la emergencia|16=fr|17=Peret|18=pl|19=Peret|20=ro|21=Peret|qq=draft|qq=draft}} season'''. == See Also == * {{ill|Gezer calendar|de|Gezer-Kalender|qq=draft|qq=draft}} == References == * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss|qq=draft|qq=draft}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten: Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens.'' Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, {{Falsche ISBN|3-8067-8086-X}} * {{ill|Richard Anthony Parker|de|Richard Anthony Parker|qq=draft|qq=draft}}: ''The calendars of ancient Egypt.'' Chicago Press, Chicago 1950. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott|qq=draft|qq=draft}}: ''Altägyptische Festdaten.'' Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz / Wiesbaden 1950. {{Navigationsleiste Ägyptische Kalendermonate bis zum Anfang des Neuen Reiches}} {{Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months}} {{translated page|de|Chenti-chet|version=245035418|comment=Imported full de history}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Khenti-khet}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Month of the ancient Egyptian calendar]] [[Category:Agricultural history (field agriculture)]] [[Category:Harvest]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:Chenti-chet]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects in ]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace ]] }} [[sn:Khenti-khet]] [[de:Chenti-chet]] [[sn:Chenti-chet]] [[sn:henti-chet]]

From the '''{{ill|Predynastic Egypt|de|Prädynastik (Ägypten)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Predynastic Egypt|qq=}}''' until the end of the '''{{ill|Middle Kingdom of Egypt|de|Mittleres Reich (Ägypten)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Middle Kingdom of Egypt|qq=}}''', Khenti-khet originally represented the '''eleventh month''' of the '''{{ill|Sothic calendar|1=Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|1=Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar#Der ursprüngliche Mondkalender|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sothic calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|qq=}}''', covering the period from '''April 1 to April 30'''. == Background == === Position in the Calendar === {{ill|Alan Gardiner|de|Alan Gardiner|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alan Gardiner|qq=}} and {{ill|Richard Anthony Parker|de|Richard Anthony Parker|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Richard Anthony Parker|qq=}} suggest that '''Khenti-khet underwent shifts in the calendar system''' over time, which led to its '''placement as the tenth month from the {{ill|New Kingdom of Egypt|de|Neues Reich|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/New Kingdom of Egypt|qq=}} onwards'''. In the '''{{ill|Ebers calendar|de|Ebers-Kalender|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebers calendar|qq=}}''' (ca. '''1517 BCE'''), '''Khenti-khet''' corresponded to the '''first Shemu month''', falling between: * '''April 15 – May 14''' ({{ill|Elephantine|de|Elephantine|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Elephantine|qq=}}) * '''April 21 – May 20''' ({{ill|Memphis, Egypt|de|Memphis (Ägypten)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Memphis, Egypt|qq=}}) The name of the '''third Shemu month''' was later changed to '''{{ill|Epiphi|de|Epiphi|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Epiphi|qq=}}'''. === Beginning of the Wheat Harvest === The '''New Kingdom lunar calendar month {{ill|Paoni|de|Payni|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Paoni|qq=}}''' is recorded in texts from the '''{{ill|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|de|12. Dynastie|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|qq=}}''' under the name '''Khenti-khet''', marking the '''beginning of the wheat harvest'''. Administrative records place it in '''late March to early April''', as part of the '''first month of the {{ill|Peret|de|Peret (Altes Ägypten)|1=Season of the Emergence|lt=Peret|2=de|3=Peret (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=ペレト|6=zh|7=播種季|8=ru|9=Перет|10=uk|11=Перет|13=Season of the Emergence|14=es|15=Estación de la emergencia|16=fr|17=Peret|18=pl|19=Peret|20=ro|21=Peret|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Peret|13=User:Immanuelle/Season of the Emergence|qq=}} season'''. == See Also == * {{ill|Gezer calendar|de|Gezer-Kalender|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gezer calendar|qq=}} == References == * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rolf Krauss|qq=}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten: Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens.'' Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, {{Falsche ISBN|3-8067-8086-X}} * {{ill|Richard Anthony Parker|de|Richard Anthony Parker|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Richard Anthony Parker|qq=}}: ''The calendars of ancient Egypt.'' Chicago Press, Chicago 1950. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Siegfried Schott|qq=}}: ''Altägyptische Festdaten.'' Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz / Wiesbaden 1950. {{Navigationsleiste Ägyptische Kalendermonate bis zum Anfang des Neuen Reiches}} {{Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months}} {{translated page|de|Chenti-chet|version=245035418|comment=Imported full de history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Month of the ancient Egyptian calendar]] [[Category:Agricultural history (field agriculture)]] [[Category:Harvest]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:Chenti-chet]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace ]] }} [[sn:Khenti-khet]] [[de:Chenti-chet]] [[sn:Chenti-chet]] [[sn:henti-chet]]

''The One of the Valley'' |NAME2 = N11:Z1*Z1*Z1 S-N35B
3-nu-schemu |NAME2-TRANSKRIPTION = ''3-nw-šmw'' |NAME2-ERKLÄRUNG = ''Third month of the {{ill|Shemu|de|Schemu|1=Season of the Harvest|lt=Schemu|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shemu|13=User:Immanuelle/Season of the Harvest|qq=}} period'' |NAME3 = F13:X1-G17-G1-O34:Aa1-D58-D46:X1-M34

In the '''{{ill|Ebers calendar|de|Ebers-Kalender|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebers calendar|qq=}}''' (ca. '''1517 BCE'''), '''Khenti-khet''' corresponded to the '''first Shemu month''', falling between: * '''April 15 – May 14''' ({{ill|Elephantine|de|Elephantine|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Elephantine|qq=}}) * '''April 21 – May 20''' ({{ill|Memphis, Egypt|de|Memphis (Ägypten)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Memphis, Egypt|qq=}}) The name of the '''third Shemu month''' was later changed to '''{{ill|Epiphi|de|Epiphi|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Epiphi|qq=}}'''. === Beginning of the Wheat Harvest === The '''New Kingdom lunar calendar month {{ill|Paoni|de|Payni|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Paoni|qq=}}''' is recorded in texts from the '''{{ill|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|de|12. Dynastie|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|qq=}}''' under the name '''Khenti-khet''', marking the '''beginning of the wheat harvest'''. Administrative records place it in '''late March to early April''', as part of the '''first month of the {{ill|Peret|de|Peret (Altes Ägypten)|1=Season of the Emergence|lt=Peret|2=de|3=Peret (Altes Ägypten)|4=ja|5=ペレト|6=zh|7=播種季|8=ru|9=Перет|10=uk|11=Перет|13=Season of the Emergence|14=es|15=Estación de la emergencia|16=fr|17=Peret|18=pl|19=Peret|20=ro|21=Peret|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Peret|13=User:Immanuelle/Season of the Emergence|qq=}} season'''. == See Also == * {{ill|Gezer calendar|de|Gezer-Kalender|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gezer calendar|qq=}} == References == * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rolf Krauss|qq=}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten: Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens.'' {{Infobox hieroglyphs |NAME = W18-F32:X1 N5 |NAME-TRANSKRIPTION = |NAME-ERKLÄRUNG = {{ill|Khenti-khet|de|Chentechtai|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Khenti-khet|qq=}}
''Ḫntj-ẖt''
''The One of the Valley'' |NAME2 = N11:Z1*Z1*Z1 S-N35B
3-nu-schemu |NAME2-TRANSKRIPTION = ''3-nw-šmw'' |NAME2-ERKLÄRUNG = ''Third month of the [[:en:Season of the Harvest|Schemu]] period'' |NAME3 = F13:X1-G17-G1-O34:Aa1-D58-D46:X1-M34
Wepet-em-asech-bedet |NAME3-TRANSKRIPTION = ''Wpt-m-3sḫ-bdt'' |NAME3-ERKLÄRUNG = ''Beginning of the harvest of [[:en:Emmer|Emmer wheat]]'' |BILD1 = Usdaemmer1.jpg |BILD1-BREITE = 210px }} '''Khenti-khet''' was the term used in the [[:en:Egyptian calendar|Ancient Egyptian calendar]] for the harvest season and the third month of the [[:en:Season of the Harvest|Schemu]] period. The name '''"The One of the Valley"''' refers to its '''coincidence with the {{ill|Beautiful Festival of the Valley|de|Schönes Fest vom Wüstental|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beautiful Festival of the Valley|qq=}}'''. From the '''{{ill|Predynastic Egypt|de|Prädynastik (Ägypten)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Predynastic Egypt|qq=}}''' until the end of the '''{{ill|Middle Kingdom of Egypt|de|Mittleres Reich (Ägypten)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Middle Kingdom of Egypt|qq=}}''', Khenti-khet originally represented the '''eleventh month''' of the '''{{ill|Sothic calendar|1=Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|1=Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar#Der ursprüngliche Mondkalender|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sothic calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|qq=}}''', covering the period from '''April 1 to April 30'''. == Background == === Position in the Calendar === [[:en:Alan Gardiner|Alan Gardiner]] and [[:en:Richard Anthony Parker|Richard Anthony Parker]] suggest that '''Khenti-khet underwent shifts in the calendar system''' over time, which led to its '''placement as the tenth month from the [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom of Egypt]] onwards'''. In the '''{{ill|Ebers calendar|de|Ebers-Kalender|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebers calendar|qq=}}''' (ca. '''1517 BCE'''), '''Khenti-khet''' corresponded to the '''first Shemu month''', falling between: * '''April 15 – May 14''' ([[:en:Elephantine|Elephantine]]) * '''April 21 – May 20''' ([[:en:Memphis, Egypt|Memphis, Egypt]]) The name of the '''third Shemu month''' was later changed to '''{{ill|Epiphi|de|Epiphi|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Epiphi|qq=}}'''. === Beginning of the Wheat Harvest === The '''New Kingdom lunar calendar month {{ill|Paoni|de|Payni|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Paoni|qq=}}''' is recorded in texts from the '''[[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt]]''' under the name '''Khenti-khet''', marking the '''beginning of the wheat harvest'''. Administrative records place it in '''late March to early April''', as part of the '''first month of the [[:en:Season of the Emergence|Peret]] season'''. == See Also == * [[:en:Gezer calendar|Gezer calendar]] == References == * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rolf Krauss|qq=}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten: Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens.'' Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, {{Falsche ISBN|3-8067-8086-X}} * [[:en:Richard Anthony Parker|Richard Anthony Parker]]: ''The calendars of ancient Egypt.'' Chicago Press, Chicago 1950. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Siegfried Schott|qq=}}: ''Altägyptische Festdaten.'' Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz / Wiesbaden 1950. {{Navigationsleiste Ägyptische Kalendermonate bis zum Anfang des Neuen Reiches}} {{Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months}} {{translated page|de|Chenti-chet|version=245035418|comment=Imported full de history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Month of the ancient Egyptian calendar]] [[Category:Agricultural history (field agriculture)]] [[Category:Harvest]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace ]] }} [[sn:Khenti-khet]] [[de:Chenti-chet]] [[sn:Chenti-chet]] [[sn:henti-chet]]

3-nu-schemu |NAME2-TRANSKRIPTION = ''3-nw-šmw'' |NAME2-ERKLÄRUNG = ''Third month of the [[:en:Season of the Harvest|Schemu]] period'' |NAME3 = F13:X1-G17-G1-O34:Aa1-D58-D46:X1-M34
Wepet-em-asech-bedet |NAME3-TRANSKRIPTION = ''Wpt-m-3sḫ-bdt'' |NAME3-ERKLÄRUNG = ''Beginning of the harvest of [[:en:Emmer|Emmer wheat]]'' |BILD1 = Usdaemmer1.jpg |BILD1-BREITE = 210px }} '''Khenti-khet''' was the term used in the [[:en:Egyptian calendar|Ancient Egyptian calendar]] for the harvest season and the third month of the [[:en:Season of the Harvest|Schemu]] period. The name '''"The One of the Valley"''' refers to its '''coincidence with the {{ill|Beautiful Festival of the Valley|de|Schönes Fest vom Wüstental|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beautiful Festival of the Valley|qq=}}'''. From the '''{{ill|Predynastic Egypt|de|Prädynastik (Ägypten)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Predynastic Egypt|qq=}}''' until the end of the '''[[:en:Middle Kingdom of Egypt|Middle Kingdom of Egypt]]''', Khenti-khet originally represented the '''eleventh month''' of the '''{{ill|Sothic calendar|1=Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|1=Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar#Der ursprüngliche Mondkalender|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sothic calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|qq=}}''', covering the period from '''April 1 to April 30'''. == Background == === Position in the Calendar === [[:en:Alan Gardiner|Alan Gardiner]] and [[:en:Richard Anthony Parker|Richard Anthony Parker]] suggest that '''Khenti-khet underwent shifts in the calendar system''' over time, which led to its '''placement as the tenth month from the [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom of Egypt]] onwards'''. In the '''{{ill|Ebers calendar|de|Ebers-Kalender|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebers calendar|qq=}}''' (ca. '''1517 BCE'''), '''Khenti-khet''' corresponded to the '''first Shemu month''', falling between: * '''April 15 – May 14''' ([[:en:Elephantine|Elephantine]]) * '''April 21 – May 20''' ([[:en:Memphis, Egypt|Memphis, Egypt]]) The name of the '''third Shemu month''' was later changed to '''{{ill|Epiphi|de|Epiphi|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Epiphi|qq=}}'''. === Beginning of the Wheat Harvest === The '''New Kingdom lunar calendar month {{ill|Paoni|de|Payni|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Paoni|qq=}}''' is recorded in texts from the '''[[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt]]''' under the name '''Khenti-khet''', marking the '''beginning of the wheat harvest'''. Administrative records place it in '''late March to early April''', as part of the '''first month of the [[:en:Season of the Emergence|Peret]] season'''. == See Also == * [[:en:Gezer calendar|Gezer calendar]] == References == * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rolf Krauss|qq=}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten: Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens.'' Chicago Press, Chicago 1950. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Siegfried Schott|qq=}}: ''Altägyptische Festdaten.'' '''1517 BCE'''), '''Khenti-khet''' corresponded to the '''first Shemu month''', falling between: * '''April 15 – May 14''' ([[:en:Elephantine|Elephantine]]) * '''April 21 – May 20''' ([[:en:Memphis, Egypt|Memphis, Egypt]]) The name of the '''third Shemu month''' was later changed to '''{{ill|Epiphi|de|Epiphi|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Epiphi|qq=}}'''. === Beginning of the Wheat Harvest === The '''New Kingdom lunar calendar month {{ill|Paoni|de|Payni|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Paoni|qq=}}''' is recorded in texts from the '''[[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt]]''' under the name '''Khenti-khet''', marking the '''beginning of the wheat harvest'''. Administrative records place it in '''late March to early April''', as part of the '''first month of the [[:en:Season of the Emergence|Peret]] season'''. == See Also == * [[:en:Gezer calendar|Gezer calendar]] == References == * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rolf Krauss|qq=}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten: Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens.'' Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, {{Falsche ISBN|3-8067-8086-X}} * [[:en:Richard Anthony Parker|Richard Anthony Parker]]: ''The calendars of ancient Egypt.'' Chicago Press, Chicago 1950. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Siegfried Schott|qq=}}: ''Altägyptische Festdaten.'' {{Infobox hieroglyphs |NAME = W18-F32:X1 N5 |NAME-TRANSKRIPTION = |NAME-ERKLÄRUNG = {{ill|Khenti-khet|de|Chentechtai|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Khenti-khet|qq=}}
''Ḫntj-ẖt''
''The One of the Valley'' |NAME2 = N11:Z1*Z1*Z1 S-N35B
3-nu-schemu |NAME2-TRANSKRIPTION = ''3-nw-šmw'' |NAME2-ERKLÄRUNG = ''Third month of the [[:en:Season of the Harvest|Schemu]] period'' |NAME3 = F13:X1-G17-G1-O34:Aa1-D58-D46:X1-M34
Wepet-em-asech-bedet |NAME3-TRANSKRIPTION = ''Wpt-m-3sḫ-bdt'' |NAME3-ERKLÄRUNG = ''Beginning of the harvest of [[:en:Emmer|Emmer wheat]]'' |BILD1 = Usdaemmer1.jpg |BILD1-BREITE = 210px }} '''Khenti-khet''' was the term used in the [[:en:Egyptian calendar|Ancient Egyptian calendar]] for the harvest season and the third month of the [[:en:Season of the Harvest|Schemu]] period. The name '''"The One of the Valley"''' refers to its '''coincidence with the {{ill|Beautiful Festival of the Valley|de|Schönes Fest vom Wüstental|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beautiful Festival of the Valley|qq=}}'''. From the '''{{ill|Predynastic Egypt|de|Prädynastik (Ägypten)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Predynastic Egypt|qq=}}''' until the end of the '''[[:en:Middle Kingdom of Egypt|Middle Kingdom of Egypt]]''', Khenti-khet originally represented the '''eleventh month''' of the '''{{ill|Sothic calendar|1=Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|1=Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar#Der ursprüngliche Mondkalender|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sothic calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|qq=}}''', covering the period from '''April 1 to April 30'''. == Background == === Position in the Calendar === [[:en:Alan Gardiner|Alan Gardiner]] and [[:en:Richard Anthony Parker|Richard Anthony Parker]] suggest that '''Khenti-khet underwent shifts in the calendar system''' over time, which led to its '''placement as the tenth month from the [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom of Egypt]] onwards'''. In the '''{{ill|Ebers calendar|de|Ebers-Kalender|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebers calendar|qq=}}''' (ca. '''1517 BCE'''), '''Khenti-khet''' corresponded to the '''first Shemu month''', falling between: * '''April 15 – May 14''' ([[:en:Elephantine|Elephantine]]) * '''April 21 – May 20''' ([[:en:Memphis, Egypt|Memphis, Egypt]]) The name of the '''third Shemu month''' was later changed to '''{{ill|Epiphi|de|Epiphi|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Epiphi|qq=}}'''. === Beginning of the Wheat Harvest === The '''New Kingdom lunar calendar month {{ill|Paoni|de|Payni|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Paoni|qq=}}''' is recorded in texts from the '''[[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt]]''' under the name '''Khenti-khet''', marking the '''beginning of the wheat harvest'''. Administrative records place it in '''late March to early April''', as part of the '''first month of the [[:en:Season of the Emergence|Peret]] season'''. == See Also == * [[:en:Gezer calendar|Gezer calendar]] == References == * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rolf Krauss|qq=}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten: Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens.'' Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, {{Falsche ISBN|3-8067-8086-X}} * [[:en:Richard Anthony Parker|Richard Anthony Parker]]: ''The calendars of ancient Egypt.'' Chicago Press, Chicago 1950. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Siegfried Schott|qq=}}: ''Altägyptische Festdaten.'' {{Infobox hieroglyphs |NAME = W18-F32:X1 N5 |NAME-TRANSKRIPTION = |NAME-ERKLÄRUNG = {{ill|Khenti-khet|de|Chentechtai|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Khenti-khet|qq=}}
''Ḫntj-ẖt''
''The One of the Valley'' |NAME2 = N11:Z1*Z1*Z1 S-N35B
3-nu-schemu |NAME2-TRANSKRIPTION = ''3-nw-šmw'' |NAME2-ERKLÄRUNG = ''Third month of the [[:en:Season of the Harvest|Schemu]] period'' |NAME3 = F13:X1-G17-G1-O34:Aa1-D58-D46:X1-M34
Wepet-em-asech-bedet |NAME3-TRANSKRIPTION = ''Wpt-m-3sḫ-bdt'' |NAME3-ERKLÄRUNG = ''Beginning of the harvest of [[:en:Emmer|Emmer wheat]]'' |BILD1 = Usdaemmer1.jpg |BILD1-BREITE = 210px }} '''Khenti-khet''' was the term used in the [[:en:Egyptian calendar|Ancient Egyptian calendar]] for the harvest season and the third month of the [[:en:Season of the Harvest|Schemu]] period. The name '''"The One of the Valley"''' refers to its '''coincidence with the {{ill|Beautiful Festival of the Valley|de|Schönes Fest vom Wüstental|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beautiful Festival of the Valley|qq=}}'''. From the '''{{ill|Predynastic Egypt|de|Prädynastik (Ägypten)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Predynastic Egypt|qq=}}''' until the end of the '''[[:en:Middle Kingdom of Egypt|Middle Kingdom of Egypt]]''', Khenti-khet originally represented the '''eleventh month''' of the '''{{ill|Sothic calendar|1=Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|1=Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar#Der ursprüngliche Mondkalender|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sothic calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|qq=}}''', covering the period from '''April 1 to April 30'''. == Background == === Position in the Calendar === [[:en:Alan Gardiner|Alan Gardiner]] and [[:en:Richard Anthony Parker|Richard Anthony Parker]] suggest that '''Khenti-khet underwent shifts in the calendar system''' over time, which led to its '''placement as the tenth month from the [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom of Egypt]] onwards'''. In the '''{{ill|Ebers calendar|de|Ebers-Kalender|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebers calendar|qq=}}''' (ca. '''1517 BCE'''), '''Khenti-khet''' corresponded to the '''first Shemu month''', falling between: * '''April 15 – May 14''' ([[:en:Elephantine|Elephantine]]) * '''April 21 – May 20''' ([[:en:Memphis, Egypt|Memphis, Egypt]]) The name of the '''third Shemu month''' was later changed to '''{{ill|Epiphi|de|Epiphi|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Epiphi|qq=}}'''. === Beginning of the Wheat Harvest === The '''New Kingdom lunar calendar month {{ill|Paoni|de|Payni|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Paoni|qq=}}''' is recorded in texts from the '''[[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt]]''' under the name '''Khenti-khet''', marking the '''beginning of the wheat harvest'''. Administrative records place it in '''late March to early April''', as part of the '''first month of the [[:en:Season of the Emergence|Peret]] season'''. == See Also == * [[:en:Gezer calendar|Gezer calendar]] == References == * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rolf Krauss|qq=}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten: Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens.'' Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, {{Falsche ISBN|3-8067-8086-X}} * [[:en:Richard Anthony Parker|Richard Anthony Parker]]: ''The calendars of ancient Egypt.'' Chicago Press, Chicago 1950. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Siegfried Schott|qq=}}: ''Altägyptische Festdaten.'' From the '''{{ill|Predynastic Egypt|de|Prädynastik (Ägypten)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Predynastic Egypt|qq=}}''' until the end of the '''[[:en:Middle Kingdom of Egypt|Middle Kingdom of Egypt]]''', Khenti-khet originally represented the '''eleventh month''' of the '''{{ill|Ancient_Egyptian_Lunar_Calendar#The_original_lunar_calendar|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|WD=Q1944246|lt=the original lunar calendar}}''', covering the period from '''April 1 to April 30'''. == Background == === Position in the Calendar === [[:en:Alan Gardiner|Alan Gardiner]] and [[:en:Richard Anthony Parker|Richard Anthony Parker]] suggest that '''Khenti-khet underwent shifts in the calendar system''' over time, which led to its '''placement as the tenth month from the [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom of Egypt]] onwards'''. In the '''{{ill|Ebers calendar|de|Ebers-Kalender|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebers calendar|qq=}}''' (ca. '''1517 BCE'''), '''Khenti-khet''' corresponded to the '''first Shemu month''', falling between: * '''April 15 – May 14''' ([[:en:Elephantine|Elephantine]]) * '''April 21 – May 20''' ([[:en:Memphis, Egypt|Memphis, Egypt]]) The name of the '''third Shemu month''' was later changed to '''{{ill|Epiphi|de|Epiphi|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Epiphi|qq=}}'''. === Beginning of the Wheat Harvest === The '''New Kingdom lunar calendar month {{ill|Paoni|de|Payni|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Paoni|qq=}}''' is recorded in texts from the '''[[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt]]''' under the name '''Khenti-khet''', marking the '''beginning of the wheat harvest'''. Administrative records place it in '''late March to early April''', as part of the '''first month of the [[:en:Season of the Emergence|Peret]] season'''. == See Also == * [[:en:Gezer calendar|Gezer calendar]] == References == * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rolf Krauss|qq=}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten: Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens.'' The name '''"The One of the Valley"''' refers to its '''coincidence with the {{ill|Beautiful Festival of the Valley|de|Schönes Fest vom Wüstental|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beautiful Festival of the Valley|qq=}}'''. Administrative records place it in '''late March to early April''', as part of the '''first month of the [[:en:Season of the Emergence|Peret]] season'''. == See Also == * [[:en:Gezer calendar|Gezer calendar]] == References == * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rolf Krauss|qq=}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten: Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens.'' ''Ḫntj-ẖt''
''The One of the Valley'' |NAME2 = N11:Z1*Z1*Z1 S-N35B
3-nu-schemu |NAME2-TRANSKRIPTION = ''3-nw-šmw'' |NAME2-ERKLÄRUNG = ''Third month of the [[:en:Season of the Harvest|Schemu]] period'' |NAME3 = F13:X1-G17-G1-O34:Aa1-D58-D46:X1-M34

The name '''"The One of the Valley"''' refers to its '''coincidence with the {{ill|Beautiful Festival of the Valley|de|Schönes Fest vom Wüstental|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beautiful Festival of the Valley|qq=|WD=Q478205}}'''. From the '''{{ill|Predynastic Egypt|de|Prädynastik (Ägypten)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Predynastic Egypt|qq=|WD=Q714601}}''' until the end of the '''[[:en:Middle Kingdom of Egypt|Middle Kingdom of Egypt]]''', Khenti-khet originally represented the '''eleventh month''' of the '''{{ill|Ancient_Egyptian_Lunar_Calendar#The_original_lunar_calendar|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|WD=Q1944246|lt=the original lunar calendar}}''', covering the period from '''April 1 to April 30'''. == Background == === Position in the Calendar === [[:en:Alan Gardiner|Alan Gardiner]] and [[:en:Richard Anthony Parker|Richard Anthony Parker]] suggest that '''Khenti-khet underwent shifts in the calendar system''' over time, which led to its '''placement as the tenth month from the [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom of Egypt]] onwards'''. '''1517 BCE'''), '''Khenti-khet''' corresponded to the '''first Shemu month''', falling between: * '''April 15 – May 14''' ([[:en:Elephantine|Elephantine]]) * '''April 21 – May 20''' ([[:en:Memphis, Egypt|Memphis, Egypt]]) The name of the '''third Shemu month''' was later changed to '''{{ill|Epiphi|de|Epiphi|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Epiphi|qq=|WD=Q1672224}}'''. === Beginning of the Wheat Harvest === The '''New Kingdom lunar calendar month {{ill|Paoni|de|Payni|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Paoni|qq=|WD=Q643869}}''' is recorded in texts from the '''[[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt]]''' under the name '''Khenti-khet''', marking the '''beginning of the wheat harvest'''. Administrative records place it in '''late March to early April''', as part of the '''first month of the [[:en:Season of the Emergence|Peret]] season'''. == See Also == * [[:en:Gezer calendar|Gezer calendar]] == References == * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rolf Krauss|qq=|WD=Q91239}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten: Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens.'' Wepet-em-asech-bedet |NAME3-TRANSKRIPTION = ''Wpt-m-3sḫ-bdt'' |NAME3-ERKLÄRUNG = ''Beginning of the harvest of [[:en:Emmer|Emmer wheat]]'' |BILD1 = Usdaemmer1.jpg |BILD1-BREITE = 210px }} '''Khenti-khet''' was the term used in the [[:en:Egyptian calendar|Ancient Egyptian calendar]] for the harvest season and the third month of the [[:en:Season of the Harvest|Schemu]] period. The name '''"The One of the Valley"''' refers to its '''coincidence with the {{ill|Beautiful Festival of the Valley|de|Schönes Fest vom Wüstental|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beautiful Festival of the Valley|WD=Q478205}}'''. From the '''{{ill|Predynastic Egypt|de|Prädynastik (Ägypten)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Predynastic Egypt|WD=Q714601}}''' until the end of the '''[[:en:Middle Kingdom of Egypt|Middle Kingdom of Egypt]]''', Khenti-khet originally represented the '''eleventh month''' of the '''{{ill|Ancient_Egyptian_Lunar_Calendar#The_original_lunar_calendar|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|WD=Q1944246|lt=the original lunar calendar}}''', covering the period from '''April 1 to April 30'''. == Background == === Position in the Calendar === [[:en:Alan Gardiner|Alan Gardiner]] and [[:en:Richard Anthony Parker|Richard Anthony Parker]] suggest that '''Khenti-khet underwent shifts in the calendar system''' over time, which led to its '''placement as the tenth month from the [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom of Egypt]] onwards'''. In the '''{{ill|Ebers calendar|de|Ebers-Kalender|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebers calendar|WD=Q1279717}}''' (ca. '''1517 BCE'''), '''Khenti-khet''' corresponded to the '''first Shemu month''', falling between: * '''April 15 – May 14''' ([[:en:Elephantine|Elephantine]]) * '''April 21 – May 20''' ([[:en:Memphis, Egypt|Memphis, Egypt]]) The name of the '''third Shemu month''' was later changed to '''{{ill|Epiphi|de|Epiphi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Epiphi|WD=Q1672224}}'''. === Beginning of the Wheat Harvest === The '''New Kingdom lunar calendar month {{ill|Paoni|de|Payni|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Paoni|WD=Q643869}}''' is recorded in texts from the '''[[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt]]''' under the name '''Khenti-khet''', marking the '''beginning of the wheat harvest'''. Administrative records place it in '''late March to early April''', as part of the '''first month of the [[:en:Season of the Emergence|Peret]] season'''. == See Also == * [[:en:Gezer calendar|Gezer calendar]] == References == * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rolf Krauss|WD=Q91239}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten: Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens.'' Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, {{Falsche ISBN|3-8067-8086-X}} * [[:en:Richard Anthony Parker|Richard Anthony Parker]]: ''The calendars of ancient Egypt.'' Chicago Press, Chicago 1950. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Siegfried Schott|WD=Q102228}}: ''Altägyptische Festdaten.'' Administrative records place it in '''late March to early April''', as part of the '''first month of the [[:en:Season of the Emergence|Peret]] season'''. == See Also == * [[:en:Gezer calendar|Gezer calendar]] == References == * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rolf Krauss|WD=Q91239}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten: Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens.'' Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, {{Falsche ISBN|3-8067-8086-X}} * [[:en:Richard Anthony Parker|Richard Anthony Parker]]: ''The calendars of ancient Egypt.'' Chicago Press, Chicago 1950. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Siegfried Schott|WD=Q102228}}: ''Altägyptische Festdaten.'' Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz / Wiesbaden 1950. {{Navigationsleiste Ägyptische Kalendermonate bis zum Anfang des Neuen Reiches}} {{Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months}} {{translated page|de|Chenti-chet|version=245035418|comment=Imported full de history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Agricultural history (field agriculture)]] [[Category:Harvest]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Adestroyed automatic wikipedia redirects]][[Category:qqects in namespace ]] }} [[de:Chenti-chet]] [[Category:Agricultural history (field farming)]] [[Category:Months of the Ancient Egyptian Calendars]] {{wikidata link|Q1070110}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata no English label]]

[[de:Chenti-chet]] [[de:Chenti-chet]] {{Infobox hieroglyphs |NAME = W18-F32:X1 N5 |NAME-TRANSKRIPTION = |NAME-ERKLÄRUNG = {{ill|Khenti-khet|de|Chentechtai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Khenti-khet|WD=Q1070104}}
''Ḫntj-ẖt''
''The One of the Valley'' |NAME2 = N11:Z1*Z1*Z1 S-N35B
3-nu-schemu |NAME2-TRANSKRIPTION = ''3-nw-šmw'' |NAME2-ERKLÄRUNG = ''Third month of the [[:en:Season of the Harvest|Schemu]] period'' |NAME3 = F13:X1-G17-G1-O34:Aa1-D58-D46:X1-M34
Wepet-em-asech-bedet |NAME3-TRANSKRIPTION = ''Wpt-m-3sḫ-bdt'' |NAME3-ERKLÄRUNG = ''Beginning of the harvest of [[:en:Emmer|Emmer wheat]]'' |BILD1 = Usdaemmer1.jpg |BILD1-BREITE = 210px }} '''Khenti-khet''' was the term used in the [[:en:Egyptian calendar|Ancient Egyptian calendar]] for the harvest season and the third month of the [[:en:Season of the Harvest|Schemu]] period. The name '''"The One of the Valley"''' refers to its '''coincidence with the {{ill|Beautiful Festival of the Valley|de|Schönes Fest vom Wüstental|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beautiful Festival of the Valley|WD=Q478205}}'''. From the '''{{ill|Predynastic Egypt|de|Prädynastik (Ägypten)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Predynastic Egypt|WD=Q714601}}''' until the end of the '''[[:en:Middle Kingdom of Egypt|Middle Kingdom of Egypt]]''', Khenti-khet originally represented the '''eleventh month''' of the '''{{ill|Ancient_Egyptian_Lunar_Calendar#The_original_lunar_calendar|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|WD=Q1944246|lt=the original lunar calendar}}''', covering the period from '''April 1 to April 30'''. == Background == === Position in the Calendar === [[:en:Alan Gardiner|Alan Gardiner]] and [[:en:Richard Anthony Parker|Richard Anthony Parker]] suggest that '''Khenti-khet underwent shifts in the calendar system''' over time, which led to its '''placement as the tenth month from the [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom of Egypt]] onwards'''. In the '''{{ill|Ebers calendar|de|Ebers-Kalender|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebers calendar|WD=Q1279717}}''' (ca. '''1517 BCE'''), '''Khenti-khet''' corresponded to the '''first Shemu month''', falling between: * '''April 15 – May 14''' ([[:en:Elephantine|Elephantine]]) * '''April 21 – May 20''' ([[:en:Memphis, Egypt|Memphis, Egypt]]) The name of the '''third Shemu month''' was later changed to '''{{ill|Epiphi|de|Epiphi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Epiphi|WD=Q1672224}}'''. === Beginning of the Wheat Harvest === The '''New Kingdom lunar calendar month {{ill|Paoni|de|Payni|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Paoni|WD=Q643869}}''' is recorded in texts from the '''[[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt]]''' under the name '''Khenti-khet''', marking the '''beginning of the wheat harvest'''. Administrative records place it in '''late March to early April''', as part of the '''first month of the [[:en:Season of the Emergence|Peret]] season'''. == See Also == * [[:en:Gezer calendar|Gezer calendar]] == References == * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rolf Krauss|WD=Q91239}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten: Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens.'' Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, {{Falsche ISBN|3-8067-8086-X}} * [[:en:Richard Anthony Parker|Richard Anthony Parker]]: ''The calendars of ancient Egypt.'' Chicago Press, Chicago 1950. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Siegfried Schott|WD=Q102228}}: ''Altägyptische Festdaten.'' Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz / Wiesbaden 1950. {{Navigationsleiste Ägyptische Kalendermonate bis zum Anfang des Neuen Reiches}} {{Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months}} {{translated page|de|Chenti-chet|version=245035418|comment=Imported full de history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Agricultural history (field agriculture)]] [[Category:Harvest]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Adestroyed automatic wikipedia redirects]][[Category:qqects in namespace ]] }} [[de:Chenti-chet]] [[Category:Agricultural history (field farming)]] [[Category:Months of the Ancient Egyptian Calendars]] {{wikidata link|Q1070110}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata no English label]]

Wepet-em-asech-bedet |NAME3-TRANSKRIPTION = ''Wpt-m-3sḫ-bdt'' |NAME3-ERKLÄRUNG = ''Beginning of the harvest of [[:en:Emmer|Emmer wheat]]'' |BILD1 = Usdaemmer1.jpg |BILD1-BREITE = 210px }} '''Khenti-khet''' was the term used in the [[:en:Egyptian calendar|Ancient Egyptian calendar]] for the harvest season and the third month of the [[:en:Season of the Harvest|Schemu]] period. The name '''"The One of the Valley"''' refers to its '''coincidence with the {{ill|Beautiful Festival of the Valley|de|Schönes Fest vom Wüstental|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beautiful Festival of the Valley|WD=Q478205}}'''. From the '''{{ill|Predynastic Egypt|de|Prädynastik (Ägypten)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Predynastic Egypt|WD=Q714601}}''' until the end of the '''[[:en:Middle Kingdom of Egypt|Middle Kingdom of Egypt]]''', Khenti-khet originally represented the '''eleventh month''' of the '''{{ill|Ancient_Egyptian_Lunar_Calendar#The_original_lunar_calendar|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|WD=Q1944246|lt=the original lunar calendar}}''', covering the period from '''April 1 to April 30'''. == Background == === Position in the Calendar === [[:en:Alan Gardiner|Alan Gardiner]] and [[:en:Richard Anthony Parker|Richard Anthony Parker]] suggest that '''Khenti-khet underwent shifts in the calendar system''' over time, which led to its '''placement as the tenth month from the [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom of Egypt]] onwards'''. In the '''{{ill|Ebers calendar|de|Ebers-Kalender|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebers calendar|WD=Q1279717}}''' (ca. '''1517 BCE'''), '''Khenti-khet''' corresponded to the '''first Shemu month''', falling between: * '''April 15 – May 14''' ([[:en:Elephantine|Elephantine]]) * '''April 21 – May 20''' ([[:en:Memphis, Egypt|Memphis, Egypt]]) The name of the '''third Shemu month''' was later changed to '''{{ill|Epiphi|de|Epiphi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Epiphi|WD=Q1672224}}'''. === Beginning of the Wheat Harvest === The '''New Kingdom lunar calendar month {{ill|Paoni|de|Payni|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Paoni|WD=Q643869}}''' is recorded in texts from the '''[[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt]]''' under the name '''Khenti-khet''', marking the '''beginning of the wheat harvest'''. Administrative records place it in '''late March to early April''', as part of the '''first month of the [[:en:Season of the Emergence|Peret]] season'''. == See Also == * [[:en:Gezer calendar|Gezer calendar]] == References == * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rolf Krauss|WD=Q91239}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten: Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens.'' Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, {{Falsche ISBN|3-8067-8086-X}} * [[:en:Richard Anthony Parker|Richard Anthony Parker]]: ''The calendars of ancient Egypt.'' Chicago Press, Chicago 1950. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Siegfried Schott|WD=Q102228}}: ''Altägyptische Festdaten.'' Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz / Wiesbaden 1950. {{Navigationsleiste Ägyptische Kalendermonate bis zum Anfang des Neuen Reiches}} {{Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months}} {{translated page|de|Chenti-chet|version=245035418|comment=Imported full de history}} {{draft categories| }} [[de:Chenti-chet]] {{wikidata link|Q1070110}} [[Category:Adestroyed automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:Agricultural history (field agriculture)]] [[Category:Agricultural history (field farming)]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Harvest]] [[Category:Months of the Ancient Egyptian Calendars]] [[Category:qqects in namespace ]] [[Category:Wikidata no English label]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]]

From the '''{{ill|Predynastic Egypt|de|Prädynastik (Ägypten)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Predynastic Egypt|WD=Q714601}}''' until the end of the '''[[:en:Middle Kingdom of Egypt|Middle Kingdom of Egypt]]''', Khenti-khet originally represented the '''eleventh month''' of the '''{{ill|Ancient_Egyptian_Lunar_Calendar#The_original_lunar_calendar|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|WD=Q1944246|lt=the original lunar calendar}}''', covering the period from '''April 1 to April 30'''. == Background == === Position in the Calendar === [[:en:Alan Gardiner|Alan Gardiner]] and [[:en:Richard Anthony Parker|Richard Anthony Parker]] suggest that '''Khenti-khet underwent shifts in the calendar system''' over time, which led to its '''placement as the tenth month from the [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom of Egypt]] onwards'''. 3-nu-schemu |NAME2-TRANSKRIPTION = ''3-nw-šmw'' |NAME2-ERKLÄRUNG = ''Third month of the {{ill|Season of the Harvest|en|Season of the Harvest|WD=Q1248622|lt=Schemu}} period'' |NAME3 = F13:X1-G17-G1-O34:Aa1-D58-D46:X1-M34
Wepet-em-asech-bedet |NAME3-TRANSKRIPTION = ''Wpt-m-3sḫ-bdt'' |NAME3-ERKLÄRUNG = ''Beginning of the harvest of {{ill|Emmer|en|Emmer|WD=Q167339|lt=Emmer wheat}}'' |BILD1 = Usdaemmer1.jpg |BILD1-BREITE = 210px }} '''Khenti-khet''' was the term used in the {{ill|Egyptian calendar|en|Egyptian calendar|WD=Q254101|lt=Ancient Egyptian calendar}} for the harvest season and the third month of the {{ill|Season of the Harvest|en|Season of the Harvest|WD=Q1248622|lt=Schemu}} period. The name '''"The One of the Valley"''' refers to its '''coincidence with the {{ill|Beautiful Festival of the Valley|de|Schönes Fest vom Wüstental|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beautiful Festival of the Valley|WD=Q478205}}'''. From the '''{{ill|Predynastic Egypt|de|Prädynastik (Ägypten)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Predynastic Egypt|WD=Q714601}}''' until the end of the '''{{ill|Middle Kingdom of Egypt|en|Middle Kingdom of Egypt|WD=Q191324|lt=Middle Kingdom of Egypt}}''', Khenti-khet originally represented the '''eleventh month''' of the '''{{ill|Ancient_Egyptian_Lunar_Calendar#The_original_lunar_calendar|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|WD=Q1944246|lt=the original lunar calendar}}''', covering the period from '''April 1 to April 30'''. == Background == === Position in the Calendar === {{ill|Alan Gardiner|en|Alan Gardiner|WD=Q441060|lt=Alan Gardiner}} and {{ill|Richard Anthony Parker|en|Richard Anthony Parker|WD=Q2148992|lt=Richard Anthony Parker}} suggest that '''Khenti-khet underwent shifts in the calendar system''' over time, which led to its '''placement as the tenth month from the {{ill|New Kingdom of Egypt|en|New Kingdom of Egypt|WD=Q180568|lt=New Kingdom of Egypt}} onwards'''. In the '''{{ill|Ebers calendar|de|Ebers-Kalender|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebers calendar|WD=Q1279717}}''' (ca. '''1517 BCE'''), '''Khenti-khet''' corresponded to the '''first Shemu month''', falling between: * '''April 15 – May 14''' ({{ill|Elephantine|en|Elephantine|WD=Q284009|lt=Elephantine}}) * '''April 21 – May 20''' ({{ill|Memphis, Egypt|en|Memphis, Egypt|WD=Q5715|lt=Memphis, Egypt}}) The name of the '''third Shemu month''' was later changed to '''{{ill|Epiphi|de|Epiphi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Epiphi|WD=Q1672224}}'''. === Beginning of the Wheat Harvest === The '''New Kingdom lunar calendar month {{ill|Paoni|de|Payni|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Paoni|WD=Q643869}}''' is recorded in texts from the '''{{ill|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|en|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|WD=Q719639|lt=Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt}}''' under the name '''Khenti-khet''', marking the '''beginning of the wheat harvest'''. Administrative records place it in '''late March to early April''', as part of the '''first month of the {{ill|Season of the Emergence|en|Season of the Emergence|WD=Q2037143|lt=Peret}} season'''. == See Also == * {{ill|Gezer calendar|en|Gezer calendar|WD=Q1031406|lt=Gezer calendar}} == References == * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rolf Krauss|WD=Q91239}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten: Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens.'' Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, {{Falsche ISBN|3-8067-8086-X}} * {{ill|Richard Anthony Parker|en|Richard Anthony Parker|WD=Q2148992|lt=Richard Anthony Parker}}: ''The calendars of ancient Egypt.'' Chicago Press, Chicago 1950. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Siegfried Schott|WD=Q102228}}: ''Altägyptische Festdaten.'' Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz / Wiesbaden 1950. {{Navigationsleiste Ägyptische Kalendermonate bis zum Anfang des Neuen Reiches}} {{Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months}} {{translated page|de|Chenti-chet|version=245035418|comment=Imported full de history}} [[de:Chenti-chet]] {{wikidata link|Q1070110}} [[Category:Agricultural history (field agriculture)]] [[Category:Agricultural history (field farming)]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Harvest]] [[Category:Months of the Ancient Egyptian Calendars]] [[Category:Wikidata no English label]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:pages]]

''Ḫntj-ẖt''
''The One of the Valley'' |NAME2 = N11:Z1*Z1*Z1 S-N35B
3-nu-schemu |NAME2-TRANSKRIPTION = ''3-nw-šmw'' |NAME2-ERKLÄRUNG = ''Third month of the {{ill|Season of the Harvest|en|Season of the Harvest|WD=Q1248622|lt=Schemu}} period'' |NAME3 = F13:X1-G17-G1-O34:Aa1-D58-D46:X1-M34

The name '''"The One of the Valley"''' refers to its '''coincidence with the {{ill|Beautiful Festival of the Valley|de|Schönes Fest vom Wüstental|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beautiful Festival of the Valley|WD=Q478205}}'''. From the '''{{ill|Predynastic Egypt|de|Prädynastik (Ägypten)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Predynastic Egypt|WD=Q714601}}''' until the end of the '''{{ill|Middle Kingdom of Egypt|en|Middle Kingdom of Egypt|WD=Q191324|lt=Middle Kingdom of Egypt}}''', Khenti-khet originally represented the '''eleventh month''' of the '''{{ill|Ancient_Egyptian_Lunar_Calendar#The_original_lunar_calendar|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|WD=Q1944246|lt=the original lunar calendar}}''', covering the period from '''April 1 to April 30'''. == Background == === Position in the Calendar === {{ill|Alan Gardiner|en|Alan Gardiner|WD=Q441060|lt=Alan Gardiner}} and {{ill|Richard Anthony Parker|en|Richard Anthony Parker|WD=Q2148992|lt=Richard Anthony Parker}} suggest that '''Khenti-khet underwent shifts in the calendar system''' over time, which led to its '''placement as the tenth month from the {{ill|New Kingdom of Egypt|en|New Kingdom of Egypt|WD=Q180568|lt=New Kingdom of Egypt}} onwards'''. In the '''{{ill|Ebers calendar|de|Ebers-Kalender|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebers calendar|WD=Q1279717}}''' (ca. '''1517 BCE'''), '''Khenti-khet''' corresponded to the '''first Shemu month''', falling between: * '''April 15 – May 14''' ({{ill|Elephantine|en|Elephantine|WD=Q284009|lt=Elephantine}}) * '''April 21 – May 20''' ({{ill|Memphis, Egypt|en|Memphis, Egypt|WD=Q5715|lt=Memphis, Egypt}}) The name of the '''third Shemu month''' was later changed to '''{{ill|Epiphi|de|Epiphi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Epiphi|WD=Q1672224}}'''. === Beginning of the Wheat Harvest === The '''New Kingdom lunar calendar month {{ill|Paoni|de|Payni|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Paoni|WD=Q643869}}''' is recorded in texts from the '''{{ill|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|en|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|WD=Q719639|lt=Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt}}''' under the name '''Khenti-khet''', marking the '''beginning of the wheat harvest'''. Administrative records place it in '''late March to early April''', as part of the '''first month of the {{ill|Season of the Emergence|en|Season of the Emergence|WD=Q2037143|lt=Peret}} season'''. == See Also == * {{ill|Gezer calendar|en|Gezer calendar|WD=Q1031406|lt=Gezer calendar}} == References == * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rolf Krauss|WD=Q91239}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten: Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens.'' Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, {{Falsche ISBN|3-8067-8086-X}} * {{ill|Richard Anthony Parker|en|Richard Anthony Parker|WD=Q2148992|lt=Richard Anthony Parker}}: ''The calendars of ancient Egypt.'' Chicago Press, Chicago 1950. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Siegfried Schott|WD=Q102228}}: ''Altägyptische Festdaten.'' Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz / Wiesbaden 1950. {{Navigationsleiste Ägyptische Kalendermonate bis zum Anfang des Neuen Reiches}} {{Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months}} {{translated page|de|Chenti-chet|version=245035418|comment=Imported full de history}} [[de:Chenti-chet]] {{wikidata link|Q1070110}} [[Category:Agricultural history (field agriculture)]] [[Category:Agricultural history (field farming)]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Harvest]] [[Category:Months of the Ancient Egyptian Calendars]] [[Category:Wikidata no English label]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:pages]]

Chicago Press, Chicago 1950. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Siegfried Schott|WD=Q102228|1=Siegfried Schott}}: ''Altägyptische Festdaten.'' Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz / Wiesbaden 1950. {{Navigationsleiste Ägyptische Kalendermonate bis zum Anfang des Neuen Reiches}} {{Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months}} {{translated page|de|Chenti-chet|version=245035418|comment=Imported full de history}} [[de:Chenti-chet]] {{wikidata link|Q1070110}} [[Category:Agricultural history (field agriculture)]] [[Category:Agricultural history (field farming)]] [[Category:Harvest]] [[Category:Months of the Ancient Egyptian Calendars]] [[Category:Wikidata no English label]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]]

revision.text:
[[de:Chenti-chet]] [[de:Chenti-chet]] [[de:Chenti-chet]] {{Infobox hieroglyphs |NAME = W18-F32:X1 N5 |NAME-TRANSKRIPTION = |NAME-ERKLÄRUNG = {{ill|Khenti-khet|de|Chentechtai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Khenti-khet|WD=Q1070104|1=Q1070104}}
''Ḫntj-ẖt''
''The One of the Valley'' |NAME2 = N11:Z1*Z1*Z1 S-N35B
3-nu-schemu |NAME2-TRANSKRIPTION = ''3-nw-šmw'' |NAME2-ERKLÄRUNG = ''Third month of the {{ill|Season of the Harvest|en|Season of the Harvest|WD=Q1248622|lt=Schemu|1=Season of the Harvest}} period'' |NAME3 = F13:X1-G17-G1-O34:Aa1-D58-D46:X1-M34
Wepet-em-asech-bedet |NAME3-TRANSKRIPTION = ''Wpt-m-3sḫ-bdt'' |NAME3-ERKLÄRUNG = ''Beginning of the harvest of {{ill|Emmer|en|Emmer|WD=Q167339|lt=Emmer wheat|1=Emmer}}'' |BILD1 = Usdaemmer1.jpg |BILD1-BREITE = 210px }} '''Khenti-khet''' was the term used in the {{ill|Egyptian calendar|en|Egyptian calendar|WD=Q254101|lt=Ancient Egyptian calendar|1=Egyptian calendar}} for the harvest season and the third month of the {{ill|Season of the Harvest|en|Season of the Harvest|WD=Q1248622|lt=Schemu|1=Season of the Harvest}} period. The name '''"The One of the Valley"''' refers to its '''coincidence with the {{ill|Beautiful Festival of the Valley|de|Schönes Fest vom Wüstental|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beautiful Festival of the Valley|WD=Q478205|1=Beautiful Festival of the Valley}}'''. From the '''{{ill|Predynastic Egypt|de|Prädynastik (Ägypten)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Predynastic Egypt|WD=Q714601|1=Predynastic Egypt}}''' until the end of the '''{{ill|Middle Kingdom of Egypt|en|Middle Kingdom of Egypt|WD=Q191324|lt=Middle Kingdom of Egypt|1=Middle Kingdom of Egypt}}''', Khenti-khet originally represented the '''eleventh month''' of the '''{{ill|Ancient_Egyptian_Lunar_Calendar#The_original_lunar_calendar|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|WD=Q1944246|lt=the original lunar calendar|1=Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar}}''', covering the period from '''April 1 to April 30'''. == Background == === Position in the Calendar === {{ill|Alan Gardiner|en|Alan Gardiner|WD=Q441060|lt=Alan Gardiner|1=Alan Gardiner}} and {{ill|Richard Anthony Parker|en|Richard Anthony Parker|WD=Q2148992|lt=Richard Anthony Parker|1=Richard Anthony Parker}} suggest that '''Khenti-khet underwent shifts in the calendar system''' over time, which led to its '''placement as the tenth month from the {{ill|New Kingdom of Egypt|en|New Kingdom of Egypt|WD=Q180568|lt=New Kingdom of Egypt|1=New Kingdom of Egypt}} onwards'''. In the '''{{ill|Ebers calendar|de|Ebers-Kalender|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebers calendar|WD=Q1279717|1=Ebers calendar}}''' (ca. '''1517 BCE'''), '''Khenti-khet''' corresponded to the '''first Shemu month''', falling between: * '''April 15 – May 14''' ({{ill|Elephantine|en|Elephantine|WD=Q284009|lt=Elephantine|1=Elephantine}}) * '''April 21 – May 20''' ({{ill|Memphis, Egypt|en|Memphis, Egypt|WD=Q5715|lt=Memphis, Egypt|1=Memphis, Egypt}}) The name of the '''third Shemu month''' was later changed to '''{{ill|Epiphi|de|Epiphi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Epiphi|WD=Q1672224|1=Epip}}'''. === Beginning of the Wheat Harvest === The '''New Kingdom lunar calendar month {{ill|Paoni|de|Payni|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Paoni|WD=Q643869|1=Paoni}}''' is recorded in texts from the '''{{ill|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|en|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|WD=Q719639|lt=Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|1=Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt}}''' under the name '''Khenti-khet''', marking the '''beginning of the wheat harvest'''. Administrative records place it in '''late March to early April''', as part of the '''first month of the {{ill|Season of the Emergence|en|Season of the Emergence|WD=Q2037143|lt=Peret|1=Season of the Emergence}} season'''. == See Also == * {{ill|Gezer calendar|en|Gezer calendar|WD=Q1031406|lt=Gezer calendar|1=Gezer calendar}} == References == * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rolf Krauss|WD=Q91239|1=Rolf Krauss}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten: Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens.'' Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, {{Falsche ISBN|3-8067-8086-X}} * {{ill|Richard Anthony Parker|en|Richard Anthony Parker|WD=Q2148992|lt=Richard Anthony Parker|1=Richard Anthony Parker}}: ''The calendars of ancient Egypt.'' Chicago Press, Chicago 1950. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Siegfried Schott|WD=Q102228|1=Siegfried Schott}}: ''Altägyptische Festdaten.'' Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz / Wiesbaden 1950. {{Navigationsleiste Ägyptische Kalendermonate bis zum Anfang des Neuen Reiches}} {{Ancient Egyptian Lunar Months}} {{translated page|de|Chenti-chet|version=245035418|comment=Imported full de history}} [[de:Chenti-chet]] {{wikidata link|Q1070110}} [[Category:Agricultural history (field farming)]] [[Category:Harvest]] [[Category:Months of the Ancient Egyptian Calendars]] [[Category:Wikidata no English label]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]]

In the '''{{ill|Ebers calendar|de|Ebers-Kalender|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebers calendar|qid=Q1279717|1=Ebers calendar}}''' (ca. '''1517 BCE'''), '''Khenti-khet''' corresponded to the '''first Shemu month''', falling between: * '''April 15 – May 14''' ({{ill|Elephantine|en|Elephantine|qid=Q284009|lt=Elephantine|1=Elephantine}}) * '''April 21 – May 20''' ({{ill|Memphis, Egypt|en|Memphis, Egypt|qid=Q5715|lt=Memphis, Egypt|1=Memphis, Egypt}}) The name of the '''third Shemu month''' was later changed to '''{{ill|Epiphi|de|Epiphi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Epiphi|qid=Q1672224|1=Epip}}'''. === Beginning of the Wheat Harvest === The '''New Kingdom lunar calendar month {{ill|Paoni|de|Payni|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Paoni|qid=Q643869|1=Paoni}}''' is recorded in texts from the '''{{ill|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|en|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|qid=Q719639|lt=Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|1=Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt}}''' under the name '''Khenti-khet''', marking the '''beginning of the wheat harvest'''. Administrative records place it in '''late March to early April''', as part of the '''first month of the {{ill|Season of the Emergence|en|Season of the Emergence|qid=Q2037143|lt=Peret|1=Season of the Emergence}} season'''. == See Also == * {{ill|Gezer calendar|en|Gezer calendar|qid=Q1031406|lt=Gezer calendar|1=Gezer calendar}} == References == * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rolf Krauss|qid=Q91239|1=Rolf Krauss}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten: Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens.''
